---
title: "Urania Tucker Lady"
---

## Urania Tucker Lady

**Dates:** (b. 1791/2)

**Maiden name:** (Leeke)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

The eldest daughter of John Samuel Leeke of St John\'s I.O.W., and his wife Sophia Bargus, half-sister of FMY\'s father, she married (1817) Rear Admiral Sir Edward Tucker, Kt. (1813) KCB (1815), of  Park Place Wickham Hants.. [Dod 1844]

### Letters

- Letter from Novr 6th 1844

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
